script:
============================================================
DAILY AI & TECH NEWS BRIEF
Generated: 2025-10-15 08:23 UTC
Duration: ~50 seconds
============================================================

[HOOK - 0:00-0:05]
The AI agent revolution is here! Top models just unveiled stunning advancements in autonomous computer use. Your workflow is about to be transformed!

[STORY 1 - 0:05-0:18]
First, the 'Big 3' are unleashing *Super Agents*! Gemini 2.5 demonstrates direct computer use. OpenAI rolls out real-time APIs. Claude boosts code integration. This isn't just talk – it's AI *doing* tasks, transforming your daily workflow right now. A massive leap!

B-ROLL:
  - Split screen showing Gemini UI, OpenAI API dashboard, Claude code editor
  - Animation of an AI agent controlling a mouse cursor on a generic desktop
  - Graphic: 'AI Super Agents: Doing, Not Just Talking.'

[STORY 2 - 0:18-0:31]
Next, Claude Code 2.0's agentic coding is blowing minds. Experts claim 'other agents aren't even close'! Claude autonomously writes, debugs, and iterates code with unmatched efficiency. For developers, this is a monumental leap in productivity and innovation. Get ahead now!

B-ROLL:
  - Screenshot of Claude Code 2.0 interface (or clean code editor with 'Claude' branding)
  - Animation of code being written rapidly, debugging itself with green checkmarks
  - Graphic: 'Claude Code 2.0: Unmatched Agentic Coding.'

[STORY 3 - 0:31-0:44]
Finally, for advanced users: your TOP 5 agentic bets are in! This analysis highlights multi-agent UIs and compute scaling as key battlegrounds. If you're building or investing, orchestrating multiple AIs is crucial. This isn't beginner-level; it's your blueprint to staying ahead. Act fast!

B-ROLL:
  - Complex network diagram showing multiple AI agents interacting
  - Data center visualization (racks of servers, glowing lights)
  - Graphic: 'Top 5 Agentic Bets: Multi-Agent UI & Compute Scaling.'

[CALL TO ACTION - 0:44-0:50]
The AI world is racing! Don't miss a beat. Hit subscribe NOW for daily insights, and tell us: which AI agent breakthrough excites *you* most? See you tomorrow!

============================================================
END OF SCRIPT
============================================================
